# Logic Unit

> Logic Unit builds and operates industry-specific SaaS platforms for real industries across emerging markets.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.logic-unit.com/): Rebuild and operate software platforms that run real industries (retail, healthcare, livestock, manufacturing, logistics, facilities).
- [About](https://www.logic-unit.com/about): Corporate overview, philosophy, and history since 2013.
- [Ecosystem](https://www.logic-unit.com/ecosystem): Our product companies including Hulm Solutions, Titan MMS, and AnimalCare360.
- [Technology](https://www.logic-unit.com/technology): R&D capability, SaaS architecture, data infrastructure, AI, and IoT integrations.
- [Industries](https://www.logic-unit.com/industry): Categories served by Logic Unit software platforms.
- [Partnerships](https://www.logic-unit.com/partnerships): Funnels for strategic partnerships, system integrators, and enterprise collaboration.
- [Contact](https://www.logic-unit.com/contact): Corporate inquiry form (partnerships, investors, talent).

## Industry Detail Pages

- [Retail Software Platforms](https://www.logic-unit.com/industry/retail): SaaS platform solutions for retail business operations.
- [Healthcare Software Platforms](https://www.logic-unit.com/industry/healthcare): Operational software for clinics and healthcare environments.
- [Livestock Software Platforms](https://www.logic-unit.com/industry/livestock): Digital tools for livestock, animal care, and veterinary management.
- [Manufacturing Software Platforms](https://www.logic-unit.com/industry/manufacturing): Operations management for industrial assets and reliability.
- [Logistics Software Platforms](https://www.logic-unit.com/industry/logistics): Operations and coordination software for supply chains.
- [Facilities Software Platforms](https://www.logic-unit.com/industry/facilities): Asset and maintenance management systems.

## Partnership Detail Pages

- [Strategic Partnerships](https://www.logic-unit.com/partnerships/strategic-partnerships): Product collaboration and market expansion.
- [System Integrators](https://www.logic-unit.com/partnerships/system-integrators): Joint implementations and integration partnerships.
- [Enterprise Collaboration](https://www.logic-unit.com/partnerships/enterprise-collaboration): Platforms built for enterprise infrastructure.
